# Feature Manifest Render Audit — 2026-04-25

Phase 1 of the pre-flight audit (`/plans/before-we-proceed-with-piped-nova.md`).

## Finding

The 30 numbered section folders under `apps/web/src/features/<slug>/` are
**orphan scaffolds** generated by `apps/api/scripts/scaffold-section.ts`.
They are NOT registered in `apps/web/src/routes/index.tsx` and they are
NOT referenced by `apps/web/src/features/navigation/taxonomy.ts` (the
canonical surface map driving `DashboardSidebar` and `IconSidebar`).

The original P0 framing — "manifest lies about `done` status" — is wrong.
`featureManifest.ts:17-21` already disclaims `section.status` as
informational. The real friction point is that the orphan stubs say
"coming soon" while the actual UI is fully wired through a parallel
folder (e.g. `features/climate/SolarClimateDashboard.tsx` for §6, not
`features/climate-analysis/ClimateAnalysisPage.tsx`). A developer or AI
agent landing on the stub gets a misleading dead-end.

## Pivot B: annotate-but-keep

Rather than delete the orphans (which breaks re-runs of the scaffold
script), each `<Slug>Page.tsx` now renders `<SectionScaffold>` pointing
at the real surface.

- New shared component: `apps/web/src/features/_scaffolds/SectionScaffold.tsx`
- `apps/api/scripts/scaffold-section.ts` updated to emit the new pattern
  for any future section.
- Manifest leading comment updated to point readers at `taxonomy.ts`.

| 2 | basemap-terrain | done | `features/basemap-terrain/BasemapTerrainPage.tsx` (real, 200 lines) |

| 29 | moontrance-identity | **partial** ↑ | `features/moontrance/*`, `features/spiritual/*` |

Bolded **↑** rows are the seven `featureManifest.ts` `status` fields
reconciled in this pass (5× stub→partial, 2× partial→done).

## Verification

- `grep -RIn "coming soon" apps/web/src/features/` → returns only the
  orphan stubs by design (now annotated, not bare strings).
- `grep -RIn "Generated stub" apps/web/src/features/` → returns zero
  hits across `<Slug>Page.tsx` files (replaced by "Orphan scaffold —
  not routed").
- Manifest `status` field discrepancy with the visible UI no longer
  applies — the leading comment now points readers at `taxonomy.ts`.

## Out of scope

- Routing the orphan stubs is intentionally NOT done. They remain
  unmounted; the canonical surface map is `taxonomy.ts`.
- Section 18 (`ai-design-support`) and §25 (`reusable-frameworks`)
  remain `status: 'stub'` because the bulk of their feature items are
  `'planned'`. The few wired surfaces (NarrativeWorker, TemplatePanel)
  do not justify a status bump under the existing convention.
